title: Everdawn
description: A modpack that enhances vanilla- a lot -by adding new biomes, animals, and terrain. Meant for building and discovering.
body:
# This modpack is for exploration and creativity

A modpack that isn't for a challenge, but for long-term play.

# Features
**Furniture** - There is lots of new furniture to build with

**World Generation** - The new world generation will be very fun to explore in, especially when 
using [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)

**New Textures & Animations** - The Fresh Animations resource pack(including the Extention pack), Animated Doors RP, Animated Items, and Dramatic Skies all breathe life into Minecraft

**Mobs & Animals** - New animals have been added, such as the Animal Garden set, birds, and bears, to name a few, all with new animations and behavior

**QOL Changes** - Simple mods such as Blur+, Amendments, Comforts, and Cave Dust have been added

**Shaders** - Bliss shaders have been added for the matching feel of the modpack

**Optimization** - Lots of optimization mods improved the playability of the modpack


Type in this in chat to load your world's chunks without manually going into each individual chunk: 

_1._ /chunky center

_2._ /chunky start 500(+) 500(+)
